benefits.description: Lost weight goal without needing high glucagon doses; maintains weight loss even with low activity during winter
Maintaining weight without significant weight gain while on low maintenance dose

protocol_notes: Previously used 3.2mg, averaged under 2mg during weight loss phase. Currently on 1mg/week maintenance. Plans to cycle off in summer during high activity and resume in early winter. Considering switching to Tirzepatide in future. Never exceeded 3.2mg.
